title: cloudy
description:
Best performance modpack for 1.20 and up!
Prove me wrong.
body:
# cloudy
![.](https://i.imgur.com/Zv3j5nz.png)
by: **reub**

### **[NOW WITH A VULKAN VERSION](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cloudy/version/X7DjeS1H)**

## MOOORE FPS
This pack does 3 things perform good, look good and feel good. 
That's it.

## Enhanced Visuals and Animations
**cloudy** brings better and smoother animations to the HUD, mobs, and local player. Enjoy stunning visuals using **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** with **[Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)**, **[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)** and other mods, making your gameplay more immersive and visually appealing.

### **[DESIGNATED SHADER IS PHOTON](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)**

## Features
- **Smooth Animations:** Improved animations for the HUD, mobs, and player, providing a more fluid experience.
- **Visual Enhancements:** Enhanced graphics and visual effects, making the game world more vibrant and detailed.
- **Performance Boost:** Optimized for better FPS, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable gameplay experience.

## Support
If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please join my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/7zF3ncMPxz).
